title: haplopappus stolpii
intro: Haplopappus stolpii, also known as Stolpii's rabbitbrush, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to the western United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits associated with Haplopappus stolpii include relief from digestive issues, colds, and fever, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Haplopappus stolpii is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
